findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name ReplayAction doRun script parameter flows to CpsFlowDefinition with sandbox setting
 * @description Trace how the sandbox parameter in doRun affects script execution
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/replay-dorun-sandbox-flag
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-078
 */

import java

// Check if the sandbox field is read from the HTTP form in doRun
from MethodCall mc
where
  mc.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().hasName("ReplayAction") and
  mc.getEnclosingCallable().hasName("doRun") and
  (
    mc.getMethod().hasName(["getBoolean", "getString", "getSubmittedForm", "getParameter", "optBoolean", "get"]) or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("run")
  )
select mc, 
  "doRun data access: " + mc.getMethod().getName() + 
  " on " + mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().getName() + 
  " at line " + mc.getLocation().getStartLine()
findings.hypothesis: Check how sandbox flag is determined in doRun - is it user-controlled?

message.text: doRun data access: getSubmittedForm on StaplerRequest at line 207
doRun data access: run on ReplayAction at line 214
doRun data access: getString on JSONObject at line 214

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name Find all GroovyShell parse/evaluate calls and their sources
 * @description Identify all calls to GroovyShell methods that execute scripts
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/groovy-shell-calls
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-078
 */

import java

from MethodCall mc
where
  mc.getMethod().hasName(["evaluate", "parse", "run", "runScript", "parseClass"]) and
  (
    mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().getASupertype*().hasQualifiedName("groovy.lang", "GroovyShell") or
    mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().getASupertype*().hasQualifiedName("groovy.lang", "GroovyClassLoader")
  )
select mc, "GroovyShell/ClassLoader script execution at " + mc.getFile().getRelativePath() + ":" + mc.getLocation().getStartLine()
findings.hypothesis: Find all locations where GroovyShell or GroovyClassLoader executes scripts

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name HTTP request parameters flowing into script-related fields
 * @description Identify HTTP parameters that flow into Groovy script fields
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/http-to-groovy-fields
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-078
 */

import java
import semmle.code.java.dataflow.FlowSources

// Find methods in CpsFlowDefinition that receive remote input
from Parameter p, Method m
where
  m.getDeclaringType().getQualifiedName().matches("%workflow%cps%") and
  p.getCallable() = m and
  (
    m.hasName("doCheckScript") or
    m.hasName("doConfigSubmit") or
    m.hasName("run") or
    m.hasName("doRun") or
    m.hasName("doCheckGroovyScript")
  )
select p, "Parameter '" + p.getName() + "' in method '" + m.getName() + "' in " + m.getDeclaringType().getName()
findings.hypothesis: Find HTTP handler methods in the CPS plugin that accept script-related parameters

Parameter 'file' in method 'run' in CpsScript

Parameter 'replacementMainScript' in method 'run' in ReplayAction
Parameter 'replacementLoadedScripts' in method 'run' in ReplayAction
Parameter 'req' in method 'doRun' in ReplayAction
Parameter 'rsp' in method 'doRun' in ReplayAction

/**
 * @name ReplayAction doRun and doCheckScriptCompile - script parameter handling
 * @description Find how script content from HTTP forms is used in ReplayAction
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/replay-script-handling

import java

// Find all getSubmittedForm / getParameter / bindJSON calls in ReplayAction
from MethodCall mc
where
  mc.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().hasName("ReplayAction") and

select mc, "ReplayAction HTTP data access: " + mc.getMethod().getName() + " at line " + mc.getLocation().getStartLine() + " in method " + mc.getEnclosingCallable().getName()
findings.hypothesis: ReplayAction reads script content from HTTP form submissions

/**

 * @description Find where trusted (unsandboxed) Groovy shells are created
 * @kind problem

 * @id java/cps-trusted-shell
 * @tags security

import java

from Method m
where
  m.getDeclaringType().hasName("CpsGroovyShellFactory") or

select m, "Shell factory/shell method: " + m.getName() + " in " + m.getDeclaringType().getName() + " at line " + m.getLocation().getStartLine()

 * @description Find how doCheckScript in CpsFlowDefinition.DescriptorImpl uses trusted shell
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/cps-check-script-trusted

 */

// Find all calls within doCheckScript and doCheckScriptCompile in CpsFlowDefinition's DescriptorImpl
from MethodCall mc

  mc.getMethod().getName() + " on " + mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().getName() + 
  " at line " + mc.getLocation().getStartLine()

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name CpsGroovyShellFactory build() - sandbox parameter analysis
 * @description Find all build() calls on CpsGroovyShellFactory and what sandbox configuration they use
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/shell-factory-build-sandbox
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-078
 */

import java

// Find all calls to CpsGroovyShellFactory.build() and the chain of method calls on the factory
from MethodCall buildCall, MethodCall mc
where
  buildCall.getMethod().hasName("build") and
  buildCall.getMethod().getDeclaringType().hasName("CpsGroovyShellFactory") and
  mc.getQualifier*() = buildCall.getQualifier() and
  mc != buildCall
select buildCall, 
  "CpsGroovyShellFactory.build() at " + buildCall.getFile().getRelativePath() + ":" + buildCall.getLocation().getStartLine() +
  " in method: " + buildCall.getEnclosingCallable().getName()
findings.hypothesis: Identify all CpsGroovyShellFactory.build() calls and their sandbox configuration

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name doCheckScriptCompile sandbox field check - is the shell trusted or sandboxed?
 * @description Find how CpsGroovyShellFactory is configured in doCheckScriptCompile
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/check-script-compile-shell-config
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-078
 */

import java

// Find all method calls on CpsGroovyShellFactory within doCheckScriptCompile context
// Also look at the surrounding class context to understand sandbox flag usage
from MethodCall mc
where
  mc.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().hasName("DescriptorImpl") and
  (
    mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().hasName("CpsGroovyShellFactory") or
    mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().hasName("GroovyClassLoader") or
    mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().hasName("CpsGroovyShell")
  )
select mc, 
  "Shell-related call in " + mc.getEnclosingCallable().getName() + ": " +
  mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().getName() + "." + mc.getMethod().getName() +
  " at line " + mc.getLocation().getStartLine()
findings.hypothesis: Understand how the shell is configured in DescriptorImpl methods

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name CpsGroovyShellFactory construction in doCheckScriptCompile - sandbox field
 * @description Find how CpsGroovyShellFactory is constructed and configured in doCheckScriptCompile
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/shell-factory-construction
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-078
 */

import java

// Find ClassInstanceExpr for CpsGroovyShellFactory in doCheckScriptCompile
from ClassInstanceExpr ce
where
  ce.getConstructor().getDeclaringType().hasName("CpsGroovyShellFactory") and
  ce.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().hasName("DescriptorImpl")
select ce, 
  "CpsGroovyShellFactory constructed in " + ce.getEnclosingCallable().getName() + 
  " at line " + ce.getLocation().getStartLine() + 
  " with " + ce.getNumArgument() + " args"
findings.hypothesis: Understand how CpsGroovyShellFactory is constructed in DescriptorImpl - is it trusted?

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name forTrusted() calls and where they get user script content
 * @description Trace forTrusted() calls and whether user-controlled content reaches their parse methods
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/for-trusted-calls
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-078
 */

import java

// Find all calls to forTrusted in the codebase
from MethodCall mc
where
  mc.getMethod().hasName("forTrusted") and
  mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().hasName("CpsGroovyShellFactory")
select mc,
  "forTrusted() called in " + mc.getEnclosingCallable().getName() + 
  " at " + mc.getFile().getRelativePath() + ":" + mc.getLocation().getStartLine()
findings.hypothesis: Find all locations where forTrusted() is called to create unsandboxed shells

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name Snippetizer HTTP methods with user input - potential command injection
 * @description Check if Snippetizer's HTTP endpoints expose dangerous patterns
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity warning
 * @id java/snippetizer-http-methods
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-078
 */

import java

// Find all do* methods in Snippetizer
from Method m
where
  m.getDeclaringType().hasName("Snippetizer") and
  m.getName().matches("do%")
select m,
  "Snippetizer HTTP method: " + m.getName() + 
  " at line " + m.getLocation().getStartLine() +
  " params: " + count(Parameter p | p.getCallable() = m | p)
findings.hypothesis: Check Snippetizer HTTP endpoints for potential script injection vectors
